summary: Completed Phase 3 feature testing for OpenRTB Bidder. All features working correctly after fix to campaign creation endpoint. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tabs (Freq Cap, SPO, ML) with toggle show/hide functionality verified.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Campaign creation endpoint was missing frequency_cap, spo, ml_prediction, and bid_shading fields - now properly persists all Phase 3 features
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed create_campaign and update_campaign to pass Phase 3 fields
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns with prefix TEST_ were created and cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features (Frequency Capping, SPO, ML Prediction) are fully functional. Backend now correctly persists all campaign configuration fields. Frontend tabs show/hide input fields correctly based on toggle state.

frequency_capping.bid_endpoint: PASS - Bid requests checked against frequency limits

spo.bid_endpoint: PASS - Blocked SSPs and supply chain hops checked

ml_prediction.train_endpoint: PASS - /api/ml/train trains model from historical data

fix_applied.issue: create_campaign endpoint was not passing frequency_cap, spo, ml_prediction, bid_shading fields to Campaign model
fix_applied.solution: Added missing fields to Campaign() constructor in both create_campaign and update_campaign endpoints
